session_023_completed: Read full memory architecture — MemoryEngine, InsightExtractor, UserProfiler, ReflectionEngine all intact from Trinity build
EthicaMemory module — memory_status, memory_edit, memory_reflect, memory_reset — Training Panel pushed to Canvas Training tab
BASE_DIR path fix — modules 3 levels deep, not 2 — ~/Ethica/modules/ethica_memory/ethica_memory.py
memory_status confirmed showing real data — V, 238 conversations, values/thinking/passions populated
EthicaDistiller module — distill_run, distill_status — recursive learning pipeline
Distiller parses chat/*.txt files (USER/ASSISTANT format), re-runs InsightExtractor, updates memory
distill_log.json tracks processed files — never re-processes same file
First distillation run confirmed — chat_2026-03-12_00-19-04.txt processed, 1 exchange extracted
EthicaVoice module — voice_list, voice_select, voice_record, voice_status
131 system voices detected via pyttsx3 in gage_env
Voice profiles stored in ~/Ethica/memory/voices/ — persist across M5 migration
voice_record uses arecord (5s WAV, 22050Hz mono) with prompted sentences for consistent training samples
M5 migration path documented in voice_status — pip install TTS, profiles auto-transfer

known_issues.voice_select_coqui_patch: _patch_tts_voice() writes SELECTED_VOICE_ID to ethica_tts.py — needs testing on M5 with Coqui installed

modules: EthicaMemory v1.0 — 4 tools (memory_status, memory_edit, memory_reflect, memory_reset)
EthicaVoice v1.0 — 4 tools (voice_list, voice_select, voice_record, voice_status)
files_changed_this_session: ~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — MODULE_TRIGGERS + is_tool_trigger updated for all 3 new modules

architecture_notes.memory_architecture: Three-layer memory already built by Trinity: MemoryEngine (episodic/semantic/evolutionary), InsightExtractor (pattern extraction), UserProfiler (milestones/proactive memory), ReflectionEngine (background reflection daemon). All wired and running.
architecture_notes.training_panel: memory_status pushes to Canvas Training tab via [DEBUG:Training::...] marker. Shows profile, insights, evolution, last reflection, and edit commands.
architecture_notes.distiller_path: BASE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent — modules are 3 levels deep from Ethica root. All memory modules need .parent.parent.parent not .parent.parent.
architecture_notes.distiller_format: Chat logs parsed by splitting on [USER]: markers, then [ASSISTANT]: within each block. <think> blocks stripped. Each pair fed to InsightExtractor.
architecture_notes.voice_profiles: Stored in ~/Ethica/memory/voices/<name>/profile.json + samples/. Profiles survive Ethica migration — just copy the memory/ directory.
architecture_notes.m5_migration: Install Coqui: gage_env/bin/pip install TTS. Record samples: voice record <name>. Select: voice select <name>. ethica_tts.py backend swap is automatic.
architecture_notes.ethica_codes_like_river: Priority 8 — inject condensed surgical patch philosophy into ETHICA_SYSTEM_PROMPT in chat_engine.py. Philosophy doc at ~/Ethica/ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md is the source.
architecture_notes.conversation_log_bug: record_exchange is called at line 498 of chat_engine.py but exchanges don't persist to conversation_log.json. Likely close_session runs before exchanges are appended, or the _current_session reference is lost. Investigate _open_session/_close_session lifecycle.

memory_snapshot.name: V
memory_snapshot.note: InsightExtractor active and accumulating. relationship_depth counter not incrementing — check evolution_log wiring.

philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. 24 modules, 89 tools, fully sovereign. She speaks. She knows V. She learns. She grows.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name.
